_doc: Ratchet allowlist for tools/check-filesize.mjs (cap 500 LOC). Each entry is a god-file pending decomposition per docs/refactor/06-internal-decomposition.md. DELETE an entry when its file drops <=500 LOC. Do not ADD entries — new code must be born small.
